title: Risk assessment drives validation scope
description: Validation scope and depth are informed by risk assessment of the equipment and its impact on product quality and patient safety.
equipment_types: Analytical Balance;Microbalance;Force/Torque Tester;Handheld Dimensional Tool;CMM;Optical Measurement System;Environmental Probe;Particle Counter;Surface Profilometer;Universal Testing Machine;Hardness Tester
verification_expectation: Verify that risk assessment has been performed and drives validation scope and depth.
acceptance_criteria: Risk assessment is documented and validation scope is justified by risk.
rationale: ISO 14971 supports risk-based approach to validation scope and depth.
